author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate history, restore, and redaction replay helpers

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found history/restore/redaction commands repeat history patch normalization and replay helpers. Representative clones include history.ts:118-139 vs restore.ts:91-112, history.ts:139-167 vs restore.ts:213-241, history-redact.ts:292-313 vs restore.ts:91-112, history-redact.ts:320-339 vs history.ts:139-232, history-redact.ts:455-465 vs history.ts:173-183, and history-redact.ts:502-516 vs restore.ts:334-348. Existing pm-xk39 tracks the redaction feature, but no active item covers extracting shared replay/patch mechanics across commands. Fix by moving common history-entry read, patch normalization, replay apply, and subject resolution helpers into a shared history command module used by history, restore, and history-redact.

History patch path/op normalization and replay helpers are single-sourced; history, restore, and history-redact commands share the common module without changing CLI output; restore/history-redact/history unit tests pass; pnpm build passes.

message: Create history replay duplication finding after duplicate-check search

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: 2026-05-22: Being addressed alongside pm-85hm. Extracting shared replay/patch mechanics (ReplayDocument, EMPTY_REPLAY_DOCUMENT, replayHash, normalizeReplayPatchPath/Ops, toReplayDocument, and a tryApply core) into src/core/history/replay.ts, consumed by history.ts, restore.ts, history-redact.ts, and the new history-repair.ts. Per-command error-formatting wrappers stay local by design to preserve exact CLI error contracts (restore's rich patch-failure context, redact's op-tag, history's generic message).
